text:
There once was a curious frog. This frog had a deep longing for adventure that never quite satiated itself. One day, after pondering the mysteries of life and pondering the depths of the blue sky, it decided it had had enough idle thought.

"Today," it declared to no one in particular, hopping away.

It went on an adventure! First, it wandered down the babbling brook where fish danced among the reeds. Then it skipped over a lake that shimmered like polished silver. The frog reached the coast and paused at the edge of the ocean.

"Nothing grows here?" it wondered aloud.

Setting out at dawn, it ventured out into the wide, gray world. It climbed ancient trees that creaked with secrets. Along a forest path, a small fox caught its gaze. They exchanged curious glances. The fox sniffed the air, then licked its lips. "Mmm," it said. "Maybe a bit like rabbit."

That day, the frog
